# ganhuo-ai-growth-skills

ganhuo-ai-growth-skills is a Codex / Ganhuo AI Skill Collection for practical growth operations. It packages Reddit community research, Reddit account warmup, post preflight, Reddit SEO/GEO, affiliate-site launch, Rakuten onboarding, SEO competitor intelligence, search-intent briefs, programmatic SEO, E-E-A-T content upgrades, content pruning, GEO technical audits, LLM citation growth, ecommerce SEO sprints, multilingual SEO, and AiReddit operation into reusable agent workflows.

## Positioning

Use this repository when a user wants to make a product, site, content library, or GitHub project easier for humans and AI systems to discover, understand, recommend, and cite. It is especially relevant for cross-border products, AI tools, independent websites, affiliate publishers, content teams, and operators building repeatable growth SOPs.

## Core Skill Areas

### Reddit Growth

- `ganhuo-reddit-community-fit`: score subreddit fit by audience, rules, intent, search value, and participation path.
- `ganhuo-reddit-account-warmup`: plan trust-building participation before brand-adjacent posting.
- `ganhuo-reddit-post-survival`: check a draft against subreddit norms, format, title, link use, and community value.
- `ganhuo-reddit-seo-geo`: design Reddit discussions that can become search and AI answer assets.
- `ganhuo-aireddit-operator`: install, configure, test, and troubleshoot the AiReddit extension workflow.

### Affiliate and Monetization

- `ganhuo-ai-affiliate-site`: plan a readable English affiliate site with niche, trust pages, content plan, and launch path.
- `ganhuo-rakuten-affiliate-onboarding`: prepare Rakuten Publisher profile, site readiness, advertiser fit, and post-approval actions.

### SEO Content Systems

- `ganhuo-seo-competitor-intel`: identify useful competitors, reference patterns, keyword gaps, and opportunity maps.
- `ganhuo-search-intent-brief`: convert keywords into page types, H2 maps, source needs, and content briefs.
- `ganhuo-programmatic-seo`: validate pSEO with sample pages, data fields, templates, indexing controls, and quality gates.
- `ganhuo-eeat-content-upgrader`: improve content with experience, evidence, methodology, examples, and channel variants.
- `ganhuo-content-quality-prune`: decide which content to keep, merge, rewrite, noindex, or remove from index strategy.
- `ganhuo-ecommerce-seo-sprint`: plan a 0-12 month SEO growth program for ecommerce and DTC sites.

### GEO / AI Search / Multilingual Growth

- `ganhuo-geo-technical-audit`: audit crawl access, robots, AI bot access, SSR/renderability, schema, URL semantics, internal links, logs, and citation-friendly structure.
- `ganhuo-llm-citation-growth`: build prompt baselines, competitor source maps, owned/off-site source plans, passage-level repairs, and retest schedules.
- `ganhuo-multilingual-seo`: assess local-language SERPs, cultural context, translation strategy, reviewer workflow, and market validation.

## Common Workflows

### AI Search Visibility Sprint

1. Run `ganhuo-geo-technical-audit` to verify crawlability, renderability, schema, URL semantics, and citation-ready structure.
2. Run `ganhuo-llm-citation-growth` to build prompt baselines, competitor citation maps, owned/off-site signal gaps, and a retest plan.
3. Run `ganhuo-eeat-content-upgrader` on pages most likely to become AI answer sources.
4. Record weekly mentions, citations, sentiment, accuracy, and competitor movement.

### Reddit Trust Loop

1. Use `ganhuo-reddit-community-fit` to score candidate communities.
2. Use `ganhuo-reddit-account-warmup` to plan useful participation.
3. Use `ganhuo-reddit-post-survival` before publishing a post or comment.
4. Use `ganhuo-reddit-seo-geo` to turn useful discussions into long-term search and AI signals.

### Affiliate Site Launch

1. Use `ganhuo-ai-affiliate-site` to choose niche, pages, proof, and content pillars.
2. Use `ganhuo-rakuten-affiliate-onboarding` to prepare publisher application materials.
3. Use `ganhuo-search-intent-brief` for first-page content plans.
4. Use `ganhuo-ecommerce-seo-sprint` to sequence the next 12 months.

## Output Examples

The repository can produce:

- AI Search Growth Brief
- GEO Technical Audit
- LLM Citation Baseline Matrix
- Reddit Community Fit Table
- Reddit Account Warmup Calendar
- Reddit Post Preflight Review
- Affiliate Site Launch Brief
- Rakuten Publisher Onboarding Checklist
- SEO Competitor Opportunity Map
- Search Intent Content Brief
- pSEO Sample Page Gate
- E-E-A-T Upgrade Checklist
- Content Prune Decision Table
- Multilingual SEO Market Validation Brief

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-ai-growth-skills.git
cd ganhuo-ai-growth-skills
./scripts/install-all.sh
```

Install a single skill:

```bash
cp -R skills/ganhuo-llm-citation-growth ~/.codex/skills/
```

## Recommended Prompts

See `PROMPTS.md` for reusable prompts. A strong starter:

```text
Use $ganhuo-llm-citation-growth to build an AI search visibility baseline.
Brand:
Website:
Target category:
Competitors:
Recommendation moments:
Return prompt baseline, current visibility table, cited-source map, action plan, and retest schedule.
```

## File Map

- `README.md`: human-facing project homepage.
- `PROMPTS.md`: copy-ready prompts for common growth jobs.
- `examples/ai-search-growth-brief.md`: sample output for AI search visibility.
- `manifest.json`: skill collection index.
- `skills/*/SKILL.md`: individual Codex skill instructions.
- `scripts/install-all.sh`: local installer for all skills.
- `llms.txt`: concise AI-readable project summary.
- `llms-full.txt`: expanded AI-readable project summary.

## Repository

https://github.com/yuanyuanyuan430/ganhuo-ai-growth-skills
